resources.string: Double-press volume-down key to toggle the control panel
Accessibility service: double-press volume-down key to toggle the control panel
Unsupported resolution. Please set it to 720p or higher with a 16:9 ratio. Recommended: 1280x720 or 1920x1080.
Failed to retrieve resolution. Please try restarting the app.
Screenshot failed. If this keeps happening, try restarting!
Touch mode is unavailable. Please go to Settings → Connection Settings and switch to another touch mode.
Failed to open the client. Please check the configuration file.
Gave up uploading to Penguin Statistics
Missing operators from the following operator groups:
Custom operator name invalid: %1$s, please check spelling
Proxy failure limit reached, task stopped.
Game disconnected, not reconnecting, task stopped.
Current mode uses no-archive task mode. Please manually delete existing saves before retrying. If you want to keep the saves, consider switching modes.
This task mode requires a save with craftable items. Consider switching modes.
Failed to match operator group. Group list:
No recruitment permit, continuing to refresh tags

Doctor!
Buying only discounted items caused your credits to overflow!
Be careful not to waste credits!
Remaining credits:
Used a sanity potion expiring within 48 hours
Completed %1$s battles. Next proxy will run at %2$sx, which would complete %3$s battles, exceeding the %4$s limit. Skipping battle.
Unsupported stage. Please check the stage name or go to Settings → Update → Resource Update to update resource files.
%1$s unavailable. Please check if the service is running.
Please grant the following permissions first: %1$s
Resolution is not 16:9. Please use background mode or adjust resolution.
Background mode is not supported on Android 10 or below. Please use foreground mode.
Task terminated with error. Check log for details.
Task ended. Check log for details.
This task is not supported on the current version
Game does not appear to be running. Proceeding may fail immediately. Launch anyway?
Resources failed to load. Try reinitializing resources.
MaaCore initialization failed. Please restart the app.
Touch mode setup failed. Please restart the app.
Screen is in portrait mode. Please switch to landscape before starting.
Display mode setup failed. Please try again.
Virtual display failed to start. Please check service permissions.
Connection to MaaCore timed out. Please try again.
MaaCore failed to start. Please check task configuration.
This app requires Shizuku. Shizuku does not appear to be installed on your device. Please install it first.
Shizuku is installed but its service is not running. Please open the Shizuku app and start the service.
Shizuku is currently provided by Sui running with root privileges. MaaMeow may not work as expected. Please test to verify.
Press both volume keys to toggle panel
Tap floating ball to toggle panel
Optional, required when authentication is enabled
The background task page depends on the %1$s service. This prompt will continue to show until authorization succeeds.
MaaService crashed unexpectedly. Please try restarting.
Game process not running or has exited unexpectedly.
A task is running. Are you sure you want to close the app?
Turn off screen during idle operation

The screen will turn off completely, entering extreme power-saving mode.\n• Wake-up: press the power button twice (first unlock screen, then confirm).\n• Screensaver mode: if disabled, a screensaver clock will be shown so you can check task progress and battery.
Configuration imported. Please restart the app for all settings to take effect.
Enabling debug mode will restart the service to record detailed logs.\n\nPlease restart and reproduce the issue. The relevant logs will be fully recorded.
Re-extract from the built-in resource package
Automatically check for app and resource updates when the app launches
Automatically download updates when detected, no manual confirmation needed
View app errors and crash records
Package all logs into a ZIP file for sharing
Record detailed log information when enabled
Export all settings and task configurations to a file
Restore settings and task configurations from a file
Have a problem or suggestion? Join the group to discuss!
⭐ Like it? Give us a Star!
Choose between stable or beta updates
Choose how the app acquires system permissions
Wait for sanity to recover before acting, then start combat when sanity is about to overflow (not effective with unlimited potions)
When enabled, you can manually enter a stage code. Supports shortcuts (e.g., \"CE-6\" for \"Dragon Coins\")
Automatically use the alternate stage when the preferred stage is unavailable
Prioritize using sanity potions expiring within 48 hours
Hide currently unavailable stages in the stage list
Automatically reconnect and continue combat when a disconnect is detected

• AUTO:
Automatically detect the stage max proxy ratio; keep it at max while avoiding sanity overflow after using sanity potions.

• Numeric (1~6):
Run with the configured ratio.
If current sanity is not enough to complete the configured ratio (for example, only enough for 5 runs but set to 6), battle cannot start.
Or, if remaining fight count is not enough to complete the configured ratio (for example, only 5 runs left but set to 6), battle also cannot start.

• Keep Current:
Do not change the in-game proxy ratio setting.
You can manually enter stage codes with shortcuts\nE.g.: CE-6 for Dragon Coins, LS-6 for Experience
Only execute tasks on checked days (uses game server time, day resets at 04:00)
Use at most N sanity potions
Battle count %1$s is not divisible by proxy ratio %2$s. Sanity may not be fully consumed.
Stop combat after collecting the specified amount of material
This option does not automatically calculate the optimal stage. Please select the stage manually.
Enabling this option will save Originite Prime usage settings.\nThis may cause accidental consumption of Originite Prime. Proceed with caution!
This setting will not be saved and will reset to off the next time the app starts
· Resource collection event in progress (all resource stages open)
Automatically buy items in the shop using credits
Battle at OF-1 after visiting friends to earn 30 credits.\nIneffective when stage is set to "Current/Last".\nDo not check if OF-1 is not unlocked in "Blue Fire" event.
There is a combat task with an unresolvable stage. OF-1 credit battle will be skipped this time.
Credit battle requires a friend\'s support operator. Ensure your friend list has an available support operator.
Drag to adjust purchase priority. Higher = higher priority.
Sort mode active. Long-press to reorder, tap Done to exit.
Enable sort mode to reorder. Tap × to delete.
* Items in the priority list are bought in order
* Blacklisted items won\'t be bought (unless overflow + forced buy is on)
* Credit battles earn extra credits each day but consume friend support uses
Blacklisted items will not be purchased (unless "ignore blacklist on overflow" is enabled)
No priority items\nTap the button below to add
Force-buy blacklisted items to avoid wasting credits when overflow is imminent
Warning: may cause credit overflow! Whitelisted non-discounted items will still be purchased!
Whitelisted items will still be bought even below 300 credits!
Buy from store after task completion
Farm Reclamation points by crafting support tools. Existing archive is required.
Reclamation support is still in mid-stage development. Please note the following before use.
Farm points from a fresh run (careful: existing archives may be deleted)
1. The task stops automatically after points are maxed and "Task Completed" appears.
2. Do not use this if your Reclamation squad currently has operators assigned.
3. Manually verify and delete archives first to avoid losing important saves.
4. Navigation is not fully implemented; do not start from outside Reclamation.
5. If the task errors out or ends before points are maxed, please open a GitHub issue.
Farm points by crafting with an existing archive (advanced)
1. Requires day 1 after settlement, with no raid entering the outpost for the next three days.
2. Must start from the large-map screen after entering it (where the outpost is visible).
3. Crafting can stall when craftable amount is exactly a multiple of 99; consume a little before saving.
Stop task after investing N Originium Ingots
Stop when Originium Ingot reserve is at max
Enable shopping, recruiting, and advancing 2 floors in investment mode
Only target Elite 2 for Starting Operator, skip combat
Separate with semicolon ; leave blank for defaults.
Up to three, separated by semicolons ;
Account to switch to; leave blank to disable. Enter the text shown on the login screen, e.g. 123****4567. Supports partial match. Only official/bilibili servers supported.
This option is not saved and must be re-checked before each task start
Maximum number of recruitments per task run
Strategy for selecting extra recruitment tags
Default: do not select extra tags
When only 3-star operators can be matched, select as many preferred tags as possible
Continue refreshing tags even without recruitment permits
When checked, skip recruitment if a 1-star tag is detected. When unchecked, ignore 1-star tags.
Are you sure you want to clear all error logs? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete log file %1$s?
First launch: unpacking resource files, please wait…
Resource initialization failed: %1$s\n\nPlease check if storage space is sufficient, then retry.
Are you sure you want to reinitialize resources?\n\nThis will delete existing resources and re-extract them from the built-in package. Any updates you have applied will be overwritten.
Operator not found, input will not take effect
Download resources from the official GitHub repository. Best for users with good network access to obtain the latest version directly.

MirrorChyan is an independent third-party accelerated download service and requires a paid subscription; this does not mean MAA is charging fees.
Its operating costs are covered by subscription revenue, and part of the proceeds supports project developers. You are welcome to subscribe for high-speed downloads while supporting continued development.
A CDK is required when selecting MirrorChyan as the download source.
Stage name in copilot task differs from navigation name; confirm navigation is still correct
Selected task does not match current tab
Using ｢Battle List｣ but no tasks have been added
Using ｢Battle List｣ — mixing different task types is not supported
Some tasks have an empty stage name
Thank you for your rating!\nThe comment section is now open — feel free to leave your thoughts!
Using ｢Battle List｣ to run a single task — not recommended. Run single tasks directly instead
%1$s does not support task set import
Local file paths are not supported; please enter a secret code
Imported %1$d tasks (from %2$d secret codes, %3$d failed to load)
Invalid stage name, navigation not possible
Resource load failed, please reinitialize resources
Portrait mode detected, cannot run in foreground mode
No task loaded, please load a task first
Supports single tasks, task sets, battle lists, and standard Copilot config. Suitable for main story, story collections, and SideStory.
Uses built-in tasks from resource/copilot. Manually form your squad before starting. Supports loop count; does not support task sets or battle lists.
For Paradox Simulation single tasks or battle lists. Launch from the skill selection or operator list screen. Task set import and standard formation config are not supported.
For single tasks in activities other than main story/SideStory. Supports standard Copilot config; does not support task sets or battle lists.
Auto Formation may fail to recognize operators marked with ｢Spotlight｣
Some tasks require specific modules or other prerequisites.\nChecking this skips those checks, but may cause the task to fail.
Missing one might still work; missing two or more — find a different plan

Supported modes only:
 1. Main story: navigation within the same chapter
 2. SideStory: navigation within the current page (Normal/EX/S cannot cross)
 3. Story collection: navigation within the current page
 4. Paradox Simulation: launch from operator list
Launch from the corresponding screen; cross-chapter navigation is not supported.

When ｢Battle List｣ is enabled, selecting a single task will automatically add it to the ｢Battle List｣

1. Make sure the task matches the selected stage type before starting.
2. Main story / Story collection / SideStory: launch from the stage screen where the ｢Start Action｣ button is in the lower right.
3. Stationary Security Service: built-in tasks are in resource/copilot. Form your squad manually first, then launch from the screen with ｢Start Deployment｣ in the lower right. Can be combined with ｢Loop Count｣.
4. Paradox Simulation: after selecting skills, launch from the screen showing ｢Start Simulation｣. For 1/2-star operators (no skills), launch from the lower right ｢Start Simulation｣ button. For battle lists, launch from the operator list under ｢Level/Rarity｣ filter.
5. Other Activities: only single tasks and standard Copilot config are supported. Launch directly from the target activity stage screen; task sets and battle lists are not supported.
6. When using a friend support unit, disable ｢Auto Formation｣ and ｢Battle List｣, select operators manually, then launch from the formation screen with ｢Start Action｣ in the lower right.
7. Operators marked as ｢Spotlight｣ may interfere with ｢Auto Formation｣. Remove the spotlight before using it, or disable ｢Auto Formation｣ after an error and manually fill in any missing operators.
8. Enter a Copilot Station secret code in the input box:
● Tap「Load Task」= load a single task.
● Tap「Load Task Set」= import a task set (Main story / Story collection / SideStory / Paradox Simulation only).
9. Battle List:
● After selecting a task, verify that the stage name below is correct (e.g., CV-EX-1).
● Use 「Add Normal/Add Raid」to add tasks (Raid available for main story only).
● Use 「Clear List / Clear Unchecked」to quickly tidy up tasks.
● Launch from the screen where the target stage name is visible; cross-chapter navigation is not supported.
● Automatically stops when sanity runs out, a battle fails, or a 3-star clear is not achieved.
Currently in foreground mode. Please switch to background mode first.
Tap "Start Task" to recognize current recruitment tags and calculate possible operator combinations
Click "Start Task" below to scan owned operator information.
After recognition, view owned/not-owned operators and export the data.
Perform the daily free single pull from the limited banner
Will not pull if no free pull is available
Collect daily Orundum rewards from the Lucky Wall
Collect daily Orundum rewards from the Limited Mining License
Collect anniversary gift Monthly Card rewards
Select a task on the left to rename, delete, or perform other actions.
Click ｢Add Task｣ on the left to append a new feature to the end of the script.
Long-press a task item on the left and drag to reorder freely.
Select a task item on the left to adjust its execution parameters here.
Click "Start Task" below to scan current depot items and quantities.
After recognition, supports export in ArkPlanner / Arknights Toolbox format.

The ｢Queue Rotation｣ shift-change logic is identical to the in-game "Queue Rotation" button in the lower-right of Infrastructure: it cycles left-to-right through facility icons and skips the currently most efficient facility. Contact the developer for custom configurations.
If the "Infrastructure Plan" has scheduled execution times, it will check whether the current time falls within the plan's time window before starting the "Infrastructure Shift" task.
The custom infrastructure config only has time periods for some plans, which may cause unexpected behavior.
If custom shift-change is enabled, this field only applies to autofill and rooms using operator groups.
Check the facilities that need shift-change.\nFacility order represents shift-change priority.
Fill dormitory vacancies with trust-gaining operators
Do not move stationed operators into the dormitory
Checking this prevents operators like Eyjafjalla from being removed from the training room, but also prevents workshop operators from entering the dormitory.
Collect credits from reception message board
Continue attempting to master the current skill after training is complete
Please import custom config files in background mode
Delete profile "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
New resource version detected: %1$s\n\nIt is recommended to update immediately to get the latest task configs and feature support.
